title: Compress It! (LTS)
description: Tie and compress various things! Free some slots in your inventory!
body:
## Tired of endless garbage in your inventory?
Compress It! Get rid of remaining doors, slabs, trapdoors, pressure plates, buttons, carpets, glass bottles, etc. Craft them back into blocks. Compress redundant loot! LTS version of [Compress It!](https://modrinth.com/mod/compress-it) by Everrynn

### This:
![Uncompressed Loot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/47e41a300e0f22c4677b47d1daae5c63653ae01d.png)

### Becomes This:
![Compressed Loot!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e8ff087ddc44a6e3d8bf48afcd55fe2f4cdfd3db.png)



### Compatibility
This mod is a port of a Fabric 1.19.2 mod to Forge 1.12.2. Right now, these are the only versions I can reasonably support
